title: Combat Power Ratio Analysis
summary: Assessing relative strength before committing to battle.
details: Calculate force ratio before engagement: count ships, weight by class capability, adjust for damage state, consider tactical position. 3:1 advantage typically ensures victory with acceptable losses. 2:1 probable victory with significant losses. 1:1 coin flip, heavy losses. Avoid fair fights - maneuver to create advantage. Force ratio alone doesn't determine outcome but heavily influences it.
annotations: Numbers matter, but tactics multiply numbers.
Create favorable ratios through maneuver, not attrition.
